local_dishes.name: Roti Canai (Vegetarian)
local_dishes.description: Flaky flatbread served with lentil curry (ask for no egg)
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Vegetarian Nasi Lemak
local_dishes.description: Coconut rice with sambal, peanuts, cucumber, and veg sides (no anchovies)
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Vegetarian Laksa
local_dishes.description: Spicy noodle soup with coconut or tamarind base made using vegetable stock
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Mee Goreng (Veg)
local_dishes.description: Stir-fried yellow noodles with vegetables and soy-based seasoning
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Vegetarian Char Kway Teow
local_dishes.description: Flat rice noodles stir-fried with vegetables and tofu
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Thosai / Dosa
local_dishes.description: South Indian–style crepe served with sambar and chutneys (widely available)
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Idli with Sambar
local_dishes.description: Steamed rice cakes with lentil curry, common in Indian Malaysian eateries
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Vegetarian Nasi Campur
local_dishes.description: Rice with assorted vegetable curries and stir-fried greens
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Popiah (Veg)
local_dishes.description: Fresh spring rolls filled with jicama, carrots, tofu, and peanuts
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Curry Puffs (Veg)
local_dishes.description: Fried pastries stuffed with spiced potatoes and peas
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Apam Balik
local_dishes.description: Sweet pancake filled with peanuts, sugar, and corn
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Kuih-Muih (Vegetarian)
local_dishes.description: Traditional bite-sized desserts made from rice flour, coconut, and palm sugar
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Cendol (Veg Dessert)
local_dishes.description: Iced dessert with coconut milk, palm sugar, and green jelly noodles
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

local_dishes.name: Teh Tarik (Vegetarian Drink)
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Keep your passport and valuables secure; use hotel safes when available
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Carry a photocopy of your passport and visa separately
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Stay alert in crowded places like markets and public transport
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid walking alone in poorly lit areas at night
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Trust your instincts—leave if a situation feels unsafe
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use Grab (ride-hailing app), or pre-arranged transport
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid unlicensed taxis and unsolicited ride offers
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Keep bags close when using public transport
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Do not display large amounts of cash in public
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use ATMs inside malls or banks rather than isolated ones
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Keep wallets, phones, and bags zipped and in front of you
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Beware of pickpocketing in busy tourist areas
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Drink bottled or filtered water
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use sunscreen and stay hydrated due to hot, humid weather
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Carry mosquito repellent, especially in the evenings
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Be cautious of overly friendly strangers offering deals or tours
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Confirm prices before shopping, eating, or using services
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid illegal activities—penalties are very strict in Malaysia
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Respect local laws, customs, and religious practices
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Dress modestly, especially at mosques, temples, and rural areas (cover shoulders & knees)
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Remove shoes before entering homes and places of worship
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Use your right hand for giving, receiving, or eating (left hand is considered impolite)
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Greet politely with a smile; a light nod or handshake is acceptable
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Respect prayer times and religious practices (Islam is the official religion)
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Ask permission before taking photos of people, especially elders and religious sites
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Stand respectfully when the national anthem is played
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Be patient and polite—Malaysians value calm and respectful behaviour
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Don't point with your index finger (use thumb or open hand instead)
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Don't touch anyone's head, especially children—it's considered disrespectful
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid public displays of affection, especially in conservative areas
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Don't criticize religion, royalty, or local customs—very sensitive topics
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Don't raise your voice or argue loudly in public
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Avoid stepping over people or food items, seen as disrespectful
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

safety_tips.tip: Don't wear revealing clothes in mosques or temples
safety_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

emergency_contacts.notes: WhatsApp for Indian nationals - message only

connectivity_tips.tip: There are 5 mobile operators in Malaysia offering prepaid sim cards for tourists: Maxis/Hotlink, CelcomDigi, U mobile, Yes, Unifi
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: CelcomDigi has the best 4G/5G network in Malaysia in 2025
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Easiest place to buy sim card is directly on arrival at Kuala Lumpur International Airport from Hotlink Maxis, Tune Talk or CelcomDigi shops
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: You can activate international roaming packs on your India number as alternative
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Ensure roaming is activated to receive SMS such as OTPs even if not purchasing international roaming pack
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/All Inclusive Guide for Langkawi.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Major providers: Maxis (Hotlink) – Strong coverage, fast data; CelcomDigi – Wide coverage, good value; U Mobile – Budget-friendly, good for cities; Yes (by YTL) – Data-focused plans
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Buy SIM cards at KLIA/KLIA2 Airport, mobile provider stores in malls, 7-Eleven stores, or online eSIM platforms
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Passport required for SIM registration - compulsory as per Malaysian law
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Tourist SIMs start from MYR 15–35, includes 15–40 GB data depending on provider & validity
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: SIM activated at store within minutes, restart phone after installation, download provider's app to track usage
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: 4G widely available across cities and tourist areas, 5G available in major cities like Kuala Lumpur
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Free Wi-Fi available in hotels, malls, cafés, and airports
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Carry power bank for navigation and Grab app usage, download offline maps as backup
connectivity_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

transport_options.description: Ride-hailing app for taxis and transport
transport_options._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

transport_options.description: Pre-arranged airport transfers and intercity travel
transport_options._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Keep routine vaccines up to date (MMR, DTP, Polio)
health_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Drink bottled/filtered water; avoid street food if unsure
health_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Use mosquito repellent to prevent dengue, chikungunya, malaria
health_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Protect from sun: sunscreen, hat, sunglasses
health_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Carry basic medicines and first-aid kit
health_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

health_tips.tip: Carry prescriptions in original packaging + digital copy
health_tips._source_file: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
